# Rule: url_credentials
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves scheme, host, path, query and fragment; redacts userinfo
# only. Example: https://admin:s3cret@db.example.com/mydb →
# https://****:****@db.example.com/mydb.

https://admin:s3cret@db.example.com/mydb	https://****:****@db.example.com/mydb
